title: Phymatopsis albopes

The Gleicheniaceae family is part of the order Hymenophyllales, and further classified into the division Pteridophyta, commonly known as ferns. Pteridophyta is a group of vascular plants that reproduce via spores. The classification of Phymatopsis albopes can be broken down into its domain and kingdom as Eukarya and Plantae, respectively. This classification system is based on the plant's cell structure, evolutionary history, and reproductive methods.
